channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ECP directs action on Islamabad local government elections amid repeated delays
item.description: The Election Commission of Pakistan (ECP) has expressed concern over the continued delay in holding local government elections in Islamabad, which have been postponed multiple times since February 202...

item.title: Democratic Rep. Huffman Questions Interior Secretary Burgum on Rising Gas Prices During Budget Hearing
item.description: During a House Natural Resources Committee hearing on President Trump's 2027 budget request, Interior Secretary Doug Burgum faced pointed questions from Rep. Jared Huffman (D-CA) regarding rising gas ...

item.title: CHED postpones 2026 pilot test of revised General Education curriculum to 2028 after stakeholder feedback
item.description: The Commission on Higher Education (CHED) announced on May 13, 2026, that it will delay the pilot testing of the proposed reframed General Education (GE) curriculum to 2028. This decision follows wide...

item.title: Jack Nicholson's Early Years as an Aspiring Actor in the 1950s
item.description: Before becoming an iconic figure of the 1970s, Jack Nicholson's early years in Los Angeles were marked by persistence and learning. Arriving in 1954 at just 17 to visit his sister, Nicholson decided t...

item.title: Coop Bank and AGRA Partner to Support Farmers with Subsidised Farming Equipment and Storage
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Tanzania has just witnessed a new partnership between Cooperative Bank Tanzania Plc (Coop Bank) and AGRA under the RE-GAIN Programme, aimed at improving food security and reducing post...

item.title: High Salt Content Found in Popular Sandwiches, Some Equivalent to Multiple Fast-Food Burgers
item.description: A recent analysis has revealed that several widely sold sandwiches contain dangerously high levels of salt, with one sandwich approaching the salt content of nearly five McDonald's burgers. Health exp...

item.title: Spotify Launches New In-App Feature to Explore Your Music History
item.description: Spotify has introduced a new in-app experience that allows users to revisit the music they have loved over the years. This feature is designed to give listeners a personalized journey through their mu...

item.title: Experts urge better alignment of Nigeria’s fiscal and trade policies to boost industrial growth
item.description: Economists, tax professionals, and investment analysts dey advise say Nigeria need arrange her fiscal reforms well with industrial and trade policies if she wan make businesses grow and attract invest...

item.title: IEBC Reminds Voters Not to Take Photos or Videos Inside Polling Booths
item.description: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) has issued a serious reminder to all voters ahead of Thursday's by-elections in Emurua Dikirr Constituency, as well as Porro and Endo Wards. ...

item.title: CERN Releases Over 17,000 KiCad Component Libraries Under Open Hardware License
item.description: CERN, a long-time supporter of open-source initiatives, has officially released its internal KiCad component libraries for public use. KiCad, pronounced 'KEE-kad', is a widely used open-source Electro...

item.title: Thunderstorms and gusty winds bring temporary relief in Delhi amid high temperatures
item.description: On Tuesday night, Delhi witnessed thunderstorms and rainfall, following a short-term weather alert issued by the India Meteorological Department (IMD). The IMD had warned that between 8:10 pm and 11:1...

item.title: Africa’s Travel Indaba Strengthens Durban’s Economy and Promotes Continental Tourism
item.description: Africa’s Travel Indaba, held at Durban’s Inkosi Albert Luthuli International Convention Centre, has emerged as a major catalyst for both the city’s and Africa’s tourism sector. With 1 000 exhibitors, ...

item.title: Early Career Portraits of Bettie Page in 1952
item.description: Bettie Mae Page (1923–2008) was a prominent American model in the 1950s, widely recognized as the “Queen of Pinups.” Known for her signature jet-black hair, blue eyes, and thick bangs, she influenced ...

item.title: Health Benefits of Carrots: Nutrients, Immunity, and Vision Explained
item.description: Carrots, often regarded as a humble side dish, are gaining recognition for their versatility and significant health benefits. British farmers produce around 700,000 tonnes annually, contributing £290 ...

item.title: Government Launches Nationwide Biometric Verification for Inua Jamii Beneficiaries
item.description: The Kenyan government has officially rolled out a nationwide proof-of-life exercise for Inua Jamii beneficiaries and caregivers, aiming to verify that recipients of the KSh 2,000 monthly stipend are a...

item.title: Reflections on the Cannes Film Festival: A gruelling yet magical celebration of cinema
item.description: In her personal account, Agnès Poirier describes the Cannes Film Festival as an intense, multifaceted experience that combines the glamour of cinema with the chaos of a massive trade event. Now in its...

item.title: Rare Humorous Tintype of a Union Officer Thumbing His Nose During the American Civil War, ca. 1863
item.description: A rare and charming quarter-plate tintype from around 1863 captures an unidentified Union officer during the American Civil War playfully thumbing his nose at the camera. Unlike the typical stiff and ...

item.title: Trump Arrives in China Without Personal Welcome from Xi Jinping
item.description: President Donald Trump arrived in Beijing, China, on May 13, 2026, for a highly anticipated summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping. Observers noted that Xi did not personally greet Trump at the airp...

item.title: Key News Updates: Prateek Yadav’s Death, Tamil Nadu CM Cancels Astrologer’s OSD Role, Air India Adjusts Flights
item.description: The post-mortem report of Prateek Yadav, son of late Mulayam Singh Yadav, revealed that he died due to a massive blood clot in the lungs, which caused a cardiorespiratory collapse. He was found uncons...

item.title: Improved house design reduces malaria, diarrhoea and pneumonia in Tanzanian children
item.description: For children dem dey live for rural Tanzania, malaria, diarrhoea and pneumonia na big wahala wey fit kill plenty small pikin. One group of international experts from architecture, public health, medic...
